name: Gold Tone Curved Heart Stud Earrings
description: Embrace modern romance with these gold-tone heart stud earrings. Featuring a unique curved, elongated heart design with a high-polish finish. Protected by an anti-tarnish coating for lasting shine.

media.alt_text: Model wearing gold tone curved elongated heart stud earrings

faqs.question: Are these suitable for sensitive ears?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are crafted with high-quality, skin-friendly materials and an anti-tarnish finish.

meta_title: Gold Tone Curved Heart Stud Earrings | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Discover our Gold Tone Curved Heart Stud Earrings. A modern, elongated heart design finished with a premium anti-tarnish coating for everyday wear.
